query:
SELECT e.id, e.menuSlug, p.establishmentId as prod_est_id, COUNT(p.id) as prod_count
FROM establishments e
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.establishmentId = e.id
GROUP BY e.id, e.menuSlug, p.establishmentId;
